purpose: Machine-readable dispatch contract for process-planning. Hooks read this as fallback ground truth when transcript classification is missing or truncated (H11 audit finding 2026-04-18). Prose contract in SKILL.md remains canonical for agent guidance; this file mirrors it for enforcement.

mandatory_dispatches.name: implementation-plan
mandatory_dispatches.notes: Produces the plan artifact with sequenced steps + acceptance criteria.

mandatory_dispatches.name: architect-reviewer
mandatory_dispatches.notes: Post-plan review — SKILL.md marks this MUST dispatch unconditionally.

mandatory_dispatches.name: adversarial-reviewer
mandatory_dispatches.notes: Classifier floor rule: Planning → adversarial-reviewer always required (every plan gets challenged before committing).

conditional_dispatches.name: prompt-engineer
conditional_dispatches.condition: plan involves LLM prompts or agent design

notes: Research compound must route through process-research per 2026-04-18 H10 fix; do NOT dispatch technical-researcher or research-analyst directly from process-planning.
